Pricing

Simple launch pricing designed to stay attractive while showing a realistic path from free scan to assisted dispute workflow.

Free Scan

$0

Upload a report and preview possible issues.

Best for seeing what the portal finds.

Ready

Vivo Assist

$49/mo

Portal updates, simple findings, document vault, and dispute draft tracking.

Lower-cost assisted workflow.

Start

Vivo Pro

$79/mo

Bureau and furnisher package workflow plus follow-up schedule.

Mailing/payment vendors must be connected before billing.

Start
Coming soon

Attorney Backup

$129/mo

Escalation review path for complex cases when available.

Attorney involvement requires a separate compliant arrangement.

Not open yet
Payment checkout is not connected yet. No fee is charged from this preview. Results vary and are not guaranteed. Certified mail, postage, credit monitoring, identity verification, report access, attorney review, and third-party costs are separate unless a written plan says they are included.
Credit Vivo

Results vary. Credit Vivo does not guarantee removals, approvals, or credit score increases. You may dispute inaccurate credit report information directly with the credit bureaus at no cost.
